query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `leads` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `firstName` varchar(128) NOT NULL, `lastName` varchar(128) NOT NULL, `email` varchar(320) NOT NULL, `phone` varchar(32), `company` varchar(256), `jobTitle` varchar(256), `website` varchar(512), `linkedIn` varchar(512), `stage` enum('new_lead','contacted','qualified','proposal_sent','closed_won','closed_lost') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new_lead', `source` enum('website_contact','book_download','booking','referral','linkedin','other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'website_contact', `dealValue` decimal(12,2), `offerInterest` enum('sprint','advisory','both','unknown') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unknown', `notes` text, `tags` json, `isArchived` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `lastContactedAt` timestamp, CONSTRAINT `leads_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`));
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user oHQ5cTB5HrMfnaD.root --database UusZELR6PWAvnyvU98nd85 --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `leads` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `firstName` varchar(128) NOT NULL, `lastName` varchar(128) NOT NULL, `email` varchar(320) NOT NULL, `phone` varchar(32), `company` varchar(256), `jobTitle` varchar(256), `website` varchar(512), `linkedIn` varchar(512), `stage` enum('new_lead','contacted','qualified','proposal_sent','closed_won','closed_lost') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new_lead', `source` enum('website_contact','book_download','booking','referral','linkedin','other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'website_contact', `dealValue` decimal(12,2), `offerInterest` enum('sprint','advisory','both','unknown') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unknown', `notes` text, `tags` json, `isArchived` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `lastContactedAt` timestamp, CONSTRAINT `leads_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`));
